title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Public Transport Questions
questions: How do you usually get around in your city?
Do you often use public transport?
What kinds of public transport are available where you live?
Do you prefer travelling by bus or by train?
How do you think public transport could be improved in your area?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Sleep Questions
questions: How many hours do you usually sleep each night?
Do you ever take naps during the day?
Do you think you get enough sleep?
What do you usually do before you go to bed?
Has the amount you sleep changed since you were younger?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Photography Questions
questions: Do you like taking photographs?
What kind of things do you like to take pictures of?
Do you prefer taking photos with a camera or a phone?
Do you often look back at old photographs?
Do you think you are good at taking photos?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Neighbours Questions
questions: Do you know your neighbours well?
What kind of people are your neighbours?
How often do you talk to the people who live near you?
Do you think it is important to have good neighbours?
Have your neighbours ever helped you with anything?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Clothes and Fashion Questions
questions: What kind of clothes do you usually wear?
Do you prefer comfortable clothes or fashionable clothes?
Do you enjoy shopping for clothes?
How important is fashion to you?
Have the clothes you like changed over the years?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Parks and Green Spaces Questions
questions: Are there many parks or green spaces where you live?
How often do you visit parks?
What do you like to do when you go to a park?
Did you go to parks often when you were a child?
Do you think cities should have more green spaces?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Learning Languages Questions
questions: How many languages can you speak?
Do you enjoy learning foreign languages?
What do you think is the best way to learn a new language?
Do you think it is difficult to learn a language as an adult?
Would you like to learn another language in the future?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Colours Questions
questions: What is your favourite colour?
Do colours affect the way you feel?
Do you like to wear brightly coloured clothes?
Did you have a favourite colour when you were a child?
Do you pay attention to colours when you buy things?
